failures.description: The required catalog dependency timed out, preventing the agent from retrieving the product evidence needed to answer whether the item has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch call with well-formed arguments. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: "catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms" with type "CatalogServiceTimeoutError". This is not a schema or argument validation problem, not a guardrail/access block, and not a misunderstanding of the user intent. The failure was not resolved later because the agent did not obtain tool evidence and ultimately answered that the task could not be completed.
